name: Update CLI Commands Spec

tasks.title: Audit
tasks.description: Verify all work in Update CLI Commands Spec is complete and correct

scope: Update CLI Commands spec at docs/specs/2026-03-12T00-06Z-cli-commands.md to reflect the current command count (53+). The spec currently lists 43 commands from the original release and needs to be brought up to date with all commands added since then.
success_criteria: Every command shown in 'wolfcastle help' and its subcommand groups has a corresponding '## wolfcastle <command>' section in the CLI commands spec
The spec's intro paragraph command count matches the actual number of leaf commands in the CLI
All new sections follow the existing spec format (Synopsis, Description, Arguments and Flags, Behavior, Output, Exit Codes)

breadcrumbs.text: Created 2 children: add-missing-command-sections (leaf, 4 tasks), finalize-spec-metadata (leaf, 2 tasks). Ordering: new command sections first, then metadata/reconciliation, since the final count depends on what was actually added. 15 commands are missing from the spec: execute, intake, archive delete/restore, config show/set/append/remove/unset, knowledge add/edit/prune/show, completion, help. Existing detailed specs found for config (2026-03-20, 2026-03-21) and knowledge (2026-03-22). Log redesign spec (2026-03-21) may require updates to the existing log section.

escalations.description: Pre-existing test failures: TestInitCmd_AlreadyInitialized and TestInitCmd_AlreadyInitialized_JSON in cmd/ package. These predate the branch (no diff on cmd/init_test.go). Should be investigated separately.
TestInitCmd_AlreadyInitialized and TestInitCmd_AlreadyInitialized_JSON in cmd package are failing. Pre-existing, not related to spec work.
